# UC-12.3.13 · AWX Job Event Callback Failures to External Logger

> **Criticality:** Medium &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Fault, Data Quality &middot; **Status:** Draft

*We watch this part of your delivery chain for risks and reliability so issues show up before they hit customers.*

---

## Description

Lost or errored job event streams break compliance evidence and task-level analytics.

## Value

Ensures AWX analytics pipeline to Splunk stays healthy for audit and troubleshooting.

## Implementation

Enable AWX log aggregator; verify `logger_name` and `job_id` fields. Alert on HEC 4xx/5xx patterns in proxy logs.

## SPL

```spl
index=automation sourcetype="awx:job_events" logger_name="awx.analytics.job_events"
| search "error" OR "failed" OR "timeout"
| stats count by cluster_host_id, job_id
| where count>=20
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Table (job_id × errors), Timeline.

## Known False Positives

Alerts from scheduled scans, pilot repositories, or vendor API throttling during bulk operations.

## References

- [AWX logging integration (job events, activity stream)](https://github.com/ansible/awx/blob/devel/docs/logging_integration.md)
- [Splunk HEC — HTTP Event Collector](https://docs.splunk.com/Documentation/Splunk/latest/Data/UsetheHTTPEventCollector)
